hooks.command: COMMAND=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -E 'git\s+commit' > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo '🔍 Running format and lint checks...' && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && ci_scripts/format_modified_files.sh && ci_scripts/lint_modified_files.sh && if ! git diff --exit-code > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo '📝 Format made changes, auto-staging them...' && git add -u && echo '✅ Formatted files staged and ready to commit!'; else echo '✅ Format and lint checks passed!'; fi || (echo '❌ Format or lint check failed. Please fix the issues before committing.' && exit 2); fi
